name: Acadia National Park
description: A rugged Atlantic coast park known for granite peaks, carriage roads, and scenic ocean vistas.

name: Arches National Park
description: Famous for more than 2,000 natural sandstone arches, dramatic fins, and red-rock landscapes.

name: Badlands National Park
description: A striking mix of eroded buttes, pinnacles, and prairie habitat rich with fossils and wildlife.

name: Bryce Canyon National Park
description: Known for vast amphitheaters filled with colorful hoodoos and high-elevation viewpoints.

name: Glacier National Park
description: A mountainous wilderness featuring alpine lakes, historic lodges, and the Going-to-the-Sun Road.

name: Grand Canyon National Park
description: Home to an immense canyon carved by the Colorado River, with layered rock revealing geologic history.

name: Grand Teton National Park
description: Features jagged peaks, glacier-fed lakes, and abundant wildlife in the Greater Yellowstone ecosystem.

name: Rocky Mountain National Park
description: A high-altitude park with tundra, mountain lakes, elk herds, and scenic drives above 12,000 feet.

name: Yellowstone National Park
description: The first U.S. national park, renowned for geysers, hot springs, canyons, and diverse wildlife.

name: Yosemite National Park
description: Celebrated for granite cliffs, giant sequoias, waterfalls, and iconic views in Yosemite Valley.
